1.name: Force Concentration
1.description: PLA ship/aircraft/missile repositioning beyond exercise norms
1.summary: Checked Taiwan MND for ship/aircraft/missile repositioning. No unusual concentration. Failed: X/OSINT (Apify fetch failed), Japan MOD (blocked).

2.name: Logistics & Mobilization
2.description: Fuel staging, ammo movement, reserve call-ups, transport requisition
2.summary: Could not check — X/OSINT is the primary source for logistics signals. Failed: X/OSINT (Apify fetch failed), Japan MOD (blocked).

8.name: Allied Response
8.summary: Checked Taiwan MND for US/Japan military repositioning. No unusual posture changes.

3.name: Airspace Control
3.description: NOTAM closures near Fujian/Strait, civilian flight rerouting

4.name: Maritime Control
4.description: MSA exclusion zones, shipping avoidance, fishing fleet recall

5.name: Taiwan Domestic Readiness
5.description: Taiwan MND raises alert level, cancels leave, activates reserves

6.name: Cyber & Infrastructure
6.description: Cyberattacks on Taiwan infra, cable cuts, GNSS jamming

7.name: Diplomatic Signals
7.description: Travel advisories upgraded, China restricts travel to Taiwan

9.description: State media narrative shift, political crisis, coercion escalation

10.name: Financial Stress
